title: Holopet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jax-animal.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A holopet jax.]]
A '''holopet''' was an interactive [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of an animal, simulating the role of a domesticated pet. A [[Holoprojector/Legends|holo-emitter]] was required to produce the holo, while a [[holo-pet data cube]] stored the pet's characteristics. Holo-pets were limited to the rooms that the holo-emitters were placed in.

Varieties of holo-pets included:
*[[Bearded jax/Legends|Jax]]
*[[Peko-peko/Legends|Peko-peko]]
*[[Quenker]]
*[[Corellian slice hound|Slice hound]]
*[[Squall (species)|Squall]]
*[[Tauntaun/Legends|Tauntaun]]
*[[Veermok/Legends|Veermok]]

Less commonly available holo-pets included an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] and a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]], as well as miniature versions of a [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] and [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]].

==Behind the scenes==
Holopets in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' let players decorate their houses with small animated holo-animals that move around in the room.

They were first introduced with Chapter 4 in November 2006 as a gift for every player that logged into the game between the release of Chapter 4 and Chapter 5 in February 2007. Each player received a holo-emitter and one random holo-pet. Two more holo-pets, [[INS-444 window installation droid|INS-444]] and [[CLE-004 window cleaning droid/Legends|CLE-004]], were added in June 2007 as rewards for the house packup event of 2007. Chapter 11 added a Tauntaun holopet and a [[:w:c:swg:Collection|collection]] that rewards players with a new holo-emitter. Players of the [[:w:c:swg:Beast Master|Beast Master profession]] also received the ability to turn unhatched creature eggs into holo-beasts.
